description_long: This is a single-serving cup of Bohunka brand strawberry yogurt, featuring a tapered cylindrical shape with a wider, sealed foil lid at the top. The lid is decorated with a large, vibrant image of strawberries and contains printed branding and product information. The cup itself is primarily off-white with printed graphics, including strawberries, a rustic house, and text in Czech. Nutritional and ingredient information is visible on the side, along with a blue and white brand logo. The packaging appears to be made of plastic with a foil seal, typical for dairy snack products. The overall appearance is clean, colorful, and designed to attract attention in a retail or urban setting.
description: A Bohunka strawberry yogurt cup with a colorful foil lid, printed branding, and strawberry graphics on a tapered plastic container.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Bohunka logo, large strawberry graphics, and the main product branding on the lid.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ingredient and nutritional information, with partial strawberry graphics and text.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more detailed product information and a rustic house illustration, with less prominent branding.
description_view_3: Side view featuring the blue and white Bohunka brand logo, barcode, and additional product details.
attribute_brand_logo: A blue and white rectangular Bohunka logo is visible on the lid and side of the cup.
attribute_flavor_indication: Strawberry flavor indicated by large strawberry graphics and the word 'jahodami' (with strawberries) on the lid and cup.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional and ingredient information is printed on the side of the cup in Czech.
